docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2021 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

DEFENDANT SALVADOR MIGUEL GUERRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ENGINEER SOIL REPAIR INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN O'CONNOR, PRESIDENT. CASE HEARD WITH 19-861422.
